name: cloudflare-auth-hasher-template
description: Private password hashing template for Cloudflare Workers using WorkerEntrypoint RPC, Argon2id, and a Rust/Wasm kernel.

scripts.check: npm run build && node ./scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run && cargo test --workspace
scripts.dev: npm run build && node ./scripts/run-wrangler.mjs dev --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: npm run build && node ./scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build && node ./scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc
